resources.string: GlowEdge needs this permission to show the glowing edges on top of your music apps. Nothing else is touched.

GlowEdge uses this only to read the music rhythm for the glow. Your audio is NEVER recorded, saved, or sent anywhere, and the app has no internet access at all. You can skip this and still use call and notification glow.
A small notification keeps GlowEdge running smoothly and gives you a quick Stop button.
Glow is ON — play some music! ✨
Clean edge-glow lock screen wallpapers in every color theme. Tap Set as Lock Screen to apply.
GlowEdge — edge glow with a live battery ring in your theme
✨ Live Wallpaper — edge glow + battery ring
A living wallpaper with your theme\'s edge glow and a battery ring. Your phone still shows its own clock on the lock screen, so this stays clean underneath. Applies to home and lock screen.
GlowEdge turns your music, naat and melodic audio into a living glow around your screen edges. Completely free — every style and feature unlocked.

✦ 13 visualizer styles
✦ 13 color themes + unlimited Custom Colors (millions of combinations)
✦ Clean edge-glow lock screen Wallpapers + a live wallpaper with clock, date & battery
✦ Beat & rhythm sync, loudness-reactive glow
✦ Glow Trigger: every sound, or music & naat only
✦ Glow Edges: all edges, sides, or top & bottom
✦ Notification Glow
✦ Thickness, speed & intensity controls
✦ Battery Saver & Auto-start
✦ Works with headphones & earbuds
✦ No ads · No tracking · No internet access
Start the glow automatically when your phone turns on.
Tell us what to improve, or report a problem — your reason helps make GlowEdge better.

My feedback / reason:



— Please describe what you liked, what to improve, or the problem you faced.
Flash the edges in an app color when a message or notification arrives. Works even without music.
Please allow notification access for GlowEdge to detect calls and messages.
Lighter glow effects that use less power.
Choose which screen edges the glow appears on.
Glow reacts only when real music or naat is playing from a media app — not to talking or notification sounds. Uses Android\'s media info (needs Notification Access), so it\'s exact, not a guess.
Music Only needs Notification Access to read what\'s playing. Please enable GlowEdge in the list.
Flash the edge glow when a call comes in — even from rest/screen-off, it wakes the screen so you see the glow. Needs phone-state permission; detection is exact.
Call Glow is on — incoming calls will flash the glow
Call Glow needs phone permission to work. Turned off.

• Styles tab: Pick how the glow looks. Tap a style card or its Apply button to use it. The Live Preview at the top shows the selected style animating.

• Start / Stop Glow: The gradient button turns the edge glow on or off. When on, the glow appears only while sound is playing.

• Settings tab: Glow Trigger (every sound / music only), Glow Edges (all / sides / top & bottom), detection sensitivity, color theme (incl. Custom Colors picker and quick wallpaper), thickness, animation speed, glow intensity, auto-start, Notification Glow, Battery Saver and startup animation.

• Wallpapers tab: Glow-themed wallpapers matching every color theme.

• About tab: How the app works, features, privacy and copyright.

• Bottom bar: Switch between Styles, Settings, Wallpapers and About.

GlowEdge uses a built-in smart audio algorithm to tell music, naat and melodic/poetry audio apart from normal talking and notification sounds. It listens in real time to how the sound is spread across frequencies, its bass and treble balance, its rhythm steadiness, and how sustained it is — all on your device, with nothing recorded or sent anywhere.\n\nWith Glow Trigger set to Music only, the glow reacts only to musical audio. Use the Sensitivity slider to make detection stricter or more relaxed. No perfect detector exists, so if a naat or song is missed, nudge the sensitivity to the right.

GlowEdge is built to be trusted:

✓ No internet permission, so your data physically cannot leave your phone.
✓ Nothing is recorded, collected, or shared. Ever.
✓ Microphone is used only to read music rhythm for the glow, never to record.
✓ Call and message glow only detects that something arrived; it never reads who called or what was said.
✓ Wallpapers are generated entirely on your device and never uploaded anywhere.
✓ Every extra permission is optional and stays off until you turn it on.

Our purpose is to add beauty, not to take anything from you.

© 2026 Ehtisham Ali (Innovation-313). All rights reserved.

GlowEdge, its design and its source code are the intellectual property of Innovation-313. Commercial use, republishing, or claiming authorship without written permission is not allowed.

Contact: innovation313.support@gmail.com
When the glow turns on, lines sweep in from the corners before settling into your style.
